modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: What to do after completing a Panopto recording?

full_description_text: 
El usuario ha terminado una grabación en Panopto. No está seguro de los pasos a seguir después de finalizar la grabación. Necesita orientación sobre el proceso posterior. Es importante aclarar qué acciones son necesarias tras la finalización.
